message:
feat(config): wire new sections and consolidate project path resolution

Add Print, GetValue, Diff, and Validate support for recently-added config
sections: tmux.activity_indicators, integrations.rano, file_reservation,
memory, privacy, and swarm (including tier allocations and marching_orders).

Consolidate project-relative path resolution into exported helpers
ResolveProjectPalettePath and ResolveProjectTemplatesDir in config/project.go,
replacing the inline logic formerly duplicated in merge.go and templates/loader.go.
Both helpers apply the same traversal-safety checks and .ntm-then-root fallback
strategy, and ResolveProjectPalettePath now also checks that the .ntm candidate
is a regular file (not a directory) before selecting it.

Move isUnsafeProjectRelativePath to project.go alongside its callers.

Fix TestCASSContextValidation to use a full Default() config so that the new
Validate sub-validators do not trip on zero-value fields unrelated to CASS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 	fmt.Fprintf(w, "default_panes = %d\n", cfg.Tmux.DefaultPanes)
 	fmt.Fprintf(w, "palette_key = %q\n", cfg.Tmux.PaletteKey)
 	fmt.Fprintf(w, "pane_init_delay_ms = %d  # Delay before send-keys to new panes\n", cfg.Tmux.PaneInitDelayMs)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "history_limit = %d       # Scrollback buffer lines per pane\n", cfg.Tmux.HistoryLimit)
+	fmt.Fprintln(w)
+
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "[tmux.activity_indicators]")
+	fmt.Fprintln(w, "# Pane border activity coloring thresholds")

+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "active_seconds = %d   # Mark pane active within this many seconds\n", cfg.Tmux.ActivityIndicators.ActiveSeconds)
+	fmt.Fprintf(w, "stalled_seconds = %d  # Mark pane stalled after this many seconds\n", cfg.Tmux.ActivityIndicators.StalledSeconds)
